ValidationRule.description: All custom Task__c records on this story must be Completed before moving to Dev Completed
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Dev Completed"), ISCHANGED(Status__c), Unit_Testing_Complete__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Unit Testing must be completed (and all dev Tasks marked Completed) before moving to "Dev Completed". Please ensure Unit Testing is done and tick the "Unit Testing Complete" checkbox.
